chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Criminal Misc. Application No.S-187 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of M.A.No.2816/2025 (S/A). ------ 15.09.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed K. Abro, Advocate for the Applicant. M/s. Habibullah G. Ghouri and Muhammad Ibrahim Lashari, Advocates a/w private Respondents. Mr. Sardar Ali, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. ------ Through instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application, the applicant has challenged the order dated 20.05.2025, passed by learned Consumer Protection Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Jacobabad, wherein report under section 173 Cr.P.C. for disposal of F.I.R. under “B” False Class was approved. Learned counsel for the applicant contends that he will be satisfied if the report is converted from “B” Class to “C” Class. Such proposal has not been opposed by learned counsel for the private respondents so also learned Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. Accordingly, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is disposed of. The Order passed by learned trial Court is maintained; however, modified to the extent that F.I.R. shall be deemed to be cancelled under “C” Class. Judge Manzoor
